title: Operations
description: Operational control plane for feature flags, plugins, deployment and tenancy.

module.description: Platform operations console for feature flags, plugins, deployment, localization, appearance and tenancy.
module.navigation_hint: Platform operations console for feature flags, plugins, deployment, localization, appearance and tenancy.

appearance.hero_lede: Govern how Catalyst applies the Inspinia Admin Customizer, global locked themes, neutral branding assets and PDF document identity.
appearance.runtime_description: Logos, favicon, document identity and PDF watermark settings are isolated here from the interactive Admin Customizer policy.

fields.allow_user_variant_override: Legacy field disabled by the Inspinia runtime
fields.allow_user_variant_override_help: Light/dark mode and visual variants are managed by the Inspinia customizer and __THEME_CONFIG__.
fields.logo_primary_help: Empty = use the neutral Catalyst/Inspinia logo.
fields.logo_dark_help: Used whenever the resolved variant is dark.
fields.favicon_help: Rendered in the shared head assets for the full platform.

messages.invalid_theme: Select the canonical Catalyst/Inspinia branding preset.
messages.invalid_watermark_color: PDF watermark color must be a hex value like #CBD5E1.

localization.hero_lede: Canonical framework tooling for English-base catalogs, per-language coverage, locale bootstrap and missing-key synchronization.

runtime_policy.title: Runtime locale policy
runtime_policy.description: The default locale still stays connected to app.project.project_lang, but the real administration surface lives here.

create_locale.title: Add locale from English base
create_locale.description: Clone the EN structure to start assisted or human translation without touching multiple folders manually.
create_locale.preview_only: Preview only, do not write files

sync_locale.title: Synchronize missing keys
sync_locale.description: Fill only missing keys from EN and preserve what has already been translated in the target locale.
sync_locale.preview_only: Preview sync only, do not write files

coverage_report.title: Coverage report for %s
coverage_report.empty: No English base catalogs were discovered.

messages.invalid_labels_json: Locale labels must be valid JSON.
messages.invalid_default_locale: Select a default locale that already exists in the catalog.
messages.preview_prepared: Locale preview prepared for %s with %s catalog actions.
messages.sync_preview: Locale sync preview found %s missing keys for %s.
messages.locale_synchronized: Locale %s synchronized from English base catalogs.

index.hero_lede: Canonical framework runtime governance surface: feature flags, plugins, deployment and tenancy decision-making.

boundaries.title: Canonical boundaries
boundaries.description: The framework separates bootstrap, runtime governance and development diagnostics to avoid ambiguous or duplicated surfaces.

setup.title: /configuration/environment-setup remains bootstrap and configuration
setup.description: App, DB, mail, session, cache, logging, security and project entry points live here. It does not govern active flags, plugins or deployments.

operations.title: /operations is the runtime control plane
operations.description: This is the canonical home for operational administration: i18n, institutional appearance, feature flags, plugins, deployment and tenancy.

devtools.title: /test-features stays diagnostic
devtools.description: It keeps probes and the technical harness. It is no longer the canonical surface for activating productive platform capabilities.

recent_runs.title: Recent deployment runs
recent_runs.description: Quick history of the formal pipeline without leaving the control plane.

feature_flags.title: Feature Flags
feature_flags.hero_lede: Environment and module defaults, role or user overrides, and coherent runtime evaluation.

catalog.title: Default catalog
catalog.description: Canonical surface for defaults persisted in features.json and read-only flags inherited from the current runtime.

project_config.label: Project configured
project_config.description: Read-only setup completion state owned by app.json.

cache_enabled.label: Cache enabled
cache_enabled.description: Read-only cache activation owned by cache.json.

route_cache.label: Route cache
route_cache.description: Read-only route cache flag owned by cache.json.

websocket_enabled.label: WebSocket runtime
websocket_enabled.description: Read-only WebSocket boot flag owned by websocket.json.

mfa.label: MFA
mfa.description: Enable MFA setup and challenge surfaces for session authentication.

notifications.label: Notifications
notifications.description: Enable authenticated notification endpoints and unread counters.

social_auth.label: Social auth
social_auth.description: Enable OAuth entry and callback routes when providers are configured.

module_framework_apiplatform.label: API Platform module
module_framework_apiplatform.description: Load the versioned API admin and bearer-token runtime surfaces.

module_framework_audit.label: Audit module
module_framework_audit.description: Load audit trails and operational evidence surfaces.

module_framework_automation.label: Automation module
module_framework_automation.description: Load internal automation rules, logs and workflow triggers.

module_framework_devtools.label: DevTools module
module_framework_devtools.description: Load technical smoke and module designer surfaces.

module_framework_documents.label: Documents module
module_framework_documents.description: Load document templates, preview and export surfaces.

module_framework_media.label: Media module
module_framework_media.description: Load reusable media library and metadata field surfaces.

module_framework_notification.label: Notification module
module_framework_notification.description: Load authenticated notification APIs and websocket token issuance.

module_framework_operations.label: Operations module
module_framework_operations.description: Load platform operations surfaces for flags, plugins, deployment and tenancy.

overrides.title: Targeted overrides
overrides.description: Real persistence by role or user, audited and evaluated at runtime.

empty.title: No overrides yet
empty.description: Flags are currently running only with their environment and module defaults.

overrides.search_placeholder: Search by flag, subject or note

form.title: Create override
form.description: Apply a real exception by role or user over a mutable feature flag.

fields.enabled_help: Checked = force enabled for this subject. Unchecked = force disabled.

messages.read_only_default: This feature flag is owned by another runtime config and is read-only here.
messages.read_only_override: Read-only flags cannot receive actor overrides.

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.hero_lede: Formal plugin manifests, controlled runtime loading and real adoption in registries, inspectors and harness.
plugins.boundary_body: The runtime only loads modules when their plugin is enabled and their module.* flag remains active. The technical contract is centralized in boot-core/plugins/*.php, PluginRegistry, PluginManager and ModuleRegistry.

grid.title: Plugin catalog
grid.description: Formal manifests, controlled loading and real adoption by module.

empty.title: No plugins registered
empty.description: No plugin manifests were discovered under boot-core/plugins.

grid.search_placeholder: Search by key, label or module

profiles.title: Registered profiles
profiles.description: Each profile defines the reusable pipeline slice without coupling external infrastructure to the framework.

form.title: Run deployment pipeline
form.description: Run the formal pipeline with preflight, staging and optional publish.

fields.dry_run_help: Checked = run only preflight and record the intent, without staging or publish.

grid.title: Deployment runs
grid.description: Operational history of the formal deployment pipeline.

empty.title: No runs recorded
empty.description: No deployment profiles have been executed yet.

grid.search_placeholder: Search by release, profile or artifact path

tenancy.title: Tenancy
tenancy.hero_lede: Canonical shared-db boundary by tenant_id, visible in runtime, repositories, audit and CLI.

runtime.title: Current runtime
runtime.description: Real status of the PA-02 boundary over canonical surfaces, without manual per-module filters.

resolution.title: Current resolution
resolution.description: Tenant active right now and the resolution source applied by the runtime.

catalog.title: Tenant Catalog
catalog.description: Inspectable catalog used by host resolution and by the canonical tenancy probes.

decision_note.title: Decision note
decision_note.description: Canonical summary of the current operational tenancy decision.
